title: kb.related.removed v1
description: Emitted by kb (src/kb_ops/related.rs:148) when `kb entry relate remove` deletes all relation edges between a pair of entries. Unlike kb.related.added.v1, no single `rel` is reported since every relation type between the pair is removed. Source: /kb.

source_id.description: Source entry id of the removed relation(s).

target_id.description: Target entry id of the removed relation(s).
